title: Telanthera lupulina
taxonomy: Telanthera lupulina is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the madder family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and molecular phylogeny. Telanthera lupulina is further classified under the genus Telanthera, which is a group of plants that share similar characteristics. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 600 genera and 13,000 species. Telanthera lupulina is a member of this family and shares many characteristics with other plants in the same genus and family.
